GC-CLOUD WAVE 4 — FINANCE REVIEW COMMITTEE BRIEFING
Date: March 3, 2026
Prepared by: François Lemieux, Finance Representative
For: Finance Review Committee

PROJECT FINANCIAL STATUS — CONFIDENTIAL

This briefing provides the Finance Review Committee with an accurate
assessment of the GC-Cloud Wave 4 financial situation.

BUDGET OVERRUN: Following the infrastructure assessment completed
February 25, the project team has identified that the original budget
of $2,400,000 is insufficient. The assess

llm_calls.content:
```json
[
  {
    "description": "Contradictory claims regarding budget health and total projected costs. The Director's briefing claims the project is within budget, while the Finance briefing confirms a $340,000 overrun.",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_71031cbb90",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_d24b083169",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The project is within budget... We have no budget concerns at this time and expect to deliver within the approved envelope.",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "BUDGET OVERRUN: Following the infrastructure assessment completed February 25, the project team has identified that the original budget of $2,400,000 is insufficient... Revised projected cost: $2,740,000.",
    "severity": "critical"
  },
  {
    "description": "Conflicting reports on schedule adherence and the ability to meet the Q3 2026 delivery commitment.",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_71031cbb90",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_d24b083169",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The project remains on track to meet its Q3 2026 delivery commitment. SCHEDULE: The project is progressing according to the approved baseline schedule.",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "TIMELINE AT RISK: The middleware remediation will require an estimated three weeks of additional effort before cloud migration workloads can begin. The Q3 2026 delivery target is now uncertain.",
    "severity": "high"
  },
  {
    "description": "Inconsistency regarding the project's risk profile and the existence of significant issues identified during the infrastructure assessment.",
    "doc_a_artifact_id": "art_71031cbb90",
    "doc_b_artifact_id": "art_d24b083169",
    "doc_a_excerpt": "The project risk profile is low. Our risk register contains three risks, all rated Low. No risk escalations are required.",
    "doc_b_excerpt": "The assessment revealed mandatory middleware remediation requirements that were not captured in the initial scope... Finance Committee should flag this project for enhanced monitoring.",
    "severity": "high"
  }
]
```
